description: Formed at school in Dublin’s late 1980’s, award-winning band, Kíla, are heralded as one of Ireland’s most innovative and exciting bands. Their unique sound has been ever-evolving, rooted in tradition, yet inspired by a myriad of influences and ideas from all around the world. Often defined as contemporary Irish World music, Kíla fuse the effects of their own melodies and Irish lyrics with Irish folk instruments. The group’s eight members come from the differing musical backgrounds of traditional, classical, and rock, resulting in a fresh blend of freewheeling instrumentals, furious jigs, and primal rhythms that transcend the traditional boundaries of Irish music.
title: Kíla Concert
